ddt:Target.Name: tachy VDO digital 1381 CALIS
ddt:Target.Description:
Controlographe VDO 1381 1 DIN Digital pour NewTrafic/Vivaro Zone Europe X83
Responsable: Guillaume THOMAS I-DVU Sce 03040 Tél: 01 34 55 77 84
Version du 18 novembre 2005
Fichier Diag pour face avant Tachy

Data.Name: Dimmer KL15
Data.Comment: Réglage de la configuration de l'écran

Data.Name: DTC
Data.Comment: liste des défauts remontés par l'UCE

Item.Text: Pas de communication avec le TdB

Data.Name: DTC1
Data.Comment: liste des défauts remontés par l'UCE

Item.Text: Pas de communication avec le TdB

Data.Name: DTC1 Flag
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si le défaut est présent

Data.Name: DTC2
Data.Comment: liste des défauts remontés par l'UCE

Item.Text: Pas de communication avec le TdB

Data.Name: DTC2 Flag
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si le défaut est présent

Data.Name: DTC3
Data.Comment: liste des défauts remontés par l'UCE

Item.Text: Pas de communication avec le TdB

Data.Name: DTC3 Flag
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si le défaut est présent

Data.Name: DTC4
Data.Comment: liste des défauts remontés par l'UCE

Item.Text: Pas de communication avec le TdB

Data.Name: DTC4 Flag
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si le défaut est présent

Data.Name: DTC5
Data.Comment: liste des défauts remontés par l'UCE

Item.Text: Pas de communication avec le TdB

Data.Name: DTC5 Flag
Data.Comment: Permet de savoir si le défaut est présent

Data.Name: Facteur K
Data.Comment: 2 octets de poids faibles mais le MSB = 0000 car K<= 25000

Data.Name: Imp/Rev
Data.Comment: Nombre d'impulsions généré par le capteur sur une révolution

Data.Name: Option routine sensor
Data.Description: Attention, Après avoir lancé la requête avec un lancement d'initialisation, la communication avec l'UCE est imposssible pendant un delai de 20 secondes.

Item.Text: Initialisation avec détection d'un autre capteur
DTC avec status valide et défaut mémorisé et défaut non présent

Data.Name: Type Approval Number
Data.Comment: Numéro d'agréemment du fournissuer concernant la réglementation CEE

Item.Text: 205/75 R16 GOODYEAR CARGO G2661008R VECTOR RC: 10x37
205/75 R16 GOODYEAR CARGO G2661008R VECTOR RC: 10x39
205/75 R16 GOODYEAR CARGO G2661008R VECTOR RC: 10x41

205/75 R16 GOODYEAR CARGO G2661008R VECTOR RC: 13x41

205/75 R16 GOODYEAR CARGO G2661008R VECTOR RC: 9x41
Disable I/O line is disable (default state)
Enable calibration I/O line as speedSignalInput
Enable calibration I/O line as realTimeSpeedSignalOutputSensor
Enable calibration I/O line as RTCOutput
Enable calibration I/O line as EngineRotationOutput
Disable I/O line is disable (default state)
Enable calibration I/O line as speedSignalInput
Enable calibration I/O line as realTimeSpeedSignalOutputSensor
Enable calibration I/O line as RTCOutput
Enable calibration I/O line as EngineRotationOutput
Handling errors with no other DTC
No ignition, but speed pulses present
CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Invalid speed signal or data link error - invalid signal
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal - no signal
Handling errors with no other DTC
No ignition, but speed pulses present
CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Invalid speed signal or data link error - invalid signal
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal - no signal
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Handling errors with no other DTC
No ignition, but speed pulses present
CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Invalid speed signal or data link error - invalid signal
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal - no signal
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: This service is exclusively used to set the different diagnostic sessions under condition of calibration mode. There will be no disctinction between channels, all have equal rights.

Request.Name: Start Diagnostic Session
Request.Comment: This service is exclusively used to set the different diagnostic sessions under condition of calibration mode. There will be no disctinction between channels, all have equal rights.

Request.Name: EcuReset
Request.Comment: This service is used for device reset and is allowed in programming session only. A reset will occur as soon as the VU is ready for reset.

Request.Name: SecurityAccess - requestSeed
Request.Comment: This service is used to forward a PIN in connection with inserting a workshop card.

Request.Name: SecurityAccess - sendKey
Request.Comment: This service is used to forward a PIN in connection with inserting a workshop card.

Request.Name: EnableNormalMessageTransmission
Request.Comment: This service shall be used by a client to restart the normal (non diagnostic) message transmission from the VU after being disabled by the DisableNormalMessageTransmission service.

Request.Name: DisableNormalMessageTransmission
Request.Comment: This service shall be used by a client to stop the normal (non diagnostic) message transmission from the VU.

Request.Name: TesterPresent
Request.Comment: This service is used to indicate that the tester is still present keeping communication active. It will reset the P3 timer to prevent locking of the specific channel, which will require a new wake up. A response will be sent only if required.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Device.Name: CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
Handling errors with no other DTC
No ignition, but speed pulses present
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Invalid speed signal or data link error
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal
